_note: FH6 LiveryGroup + layer_table memory layout. CONFIRMED working 2026-05-17 (writes propagate to render with no commit step). Strategy: scan writable private heap for u16 == expected layer_count at LiveryGroup+0x5A, validate by reading layer_table at LiveryGroup+0x78 and scoring sampled layers. Each layer is independently heap-allocated; layer_table is an array of u64 pointers (8-byte stride).

anchor._comment: No vtable RVA needed. Discovery is fully dynamic via u16 count scan + layer_table validation. Works across FH6 patches as long as the LiveryGroup struct layout (count@0x5A, table@0x78) is stable.

livery_group._comment: LiveryGroup struct offsets. Discovered via live RE; confirmed by injecting all 500 layers of a 500-sphere template successfully.
livery_group._layer_table_note: Pointer to an array of u64 layer pointers (8-byte stride). array length == layer_count.

layer_struct._comment: Per-layer struct offsets. Each layer is independently heap-allocated; the layer_table holds pointers to these structs.

fields.name: y
fields.note: Write as -y (Y is negated from FD6's image-coords)

fields.name: scale_x
fields.note: Divide rx by 63.0 for ellipses, 127.0 for other shapes

fields.name: color_rgba
fields.note: R, G, B, alpha. Alpha MUST be 255.

scan_strategy._comment: Scan writable private heap (exclude images for speed). For each u16 match at offset O, treat (region_addr + O - 0x5A) as candidate LiveryGroup; read layer_table at +0x78; sample 16 layer pointers and require >= 8 to pass _score_layer (each scoring >= 3 of 5 fields plausible). Best candidate wins.

post_write._note: Writes propagate to render instantly. Distinct from the old POSITION-signature color-storage approach which required a UI commit (color picker Enter).
